docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALMER, JOHN SCHULTZ, WOLFGANG AS TO DEFENDANT DENIS, RUBEN DOES 1 TO X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
